name: Chaos Allure Queen
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>混</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>沌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魅惑の女王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アリュール・クィーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can discard 1 other LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 monster in either GY; equip it to this card as an Equip Spell, and if you do, this card's name becomes that equipped monster's name (until the End Phase), then if you equipped a LIGHT or DARK Monster Card by this effect, you can Special Summon 1 DARK "Allure Queen" monster from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Allure Queen" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 1 other LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 monster in either GY; equip it to this card as an Equip Spell, and if you do, this card's name becomes that equipped monster's name (until the End Phase), then if you equipped a LIGHT or DARK Monster Card by this effect, you can Special Summon 1 DARK "Allure Queen" monster from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Allure Queen" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 other LIGHT or DARK monster; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 monster in either GY; equip it to this card as an Equip Spell, and if you do, this card's name becomes that equipped monster's name (until the End Phase), then if you equipped a LIGHT or DARK Monster Card by this effect, you can Special Summon 1 DARK "Allure Queen" monster from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Chaos Allure Queen" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
